dispositions.rationale: Web search confirms Dr. George Korovilas owns a single independent Chicago office at 3607 W Lawrence Ave ('serving Chicagoland since 1997', LinkedIn 'Owner, Lawrence Dental Group P.C.', own site + Yelp/WebMD); no link to Joshi Family Dentistry found. The shared_ein (reach 2) and the DB website field 'joshifamilydentistry.com' / shared_website_domain (reach 2) point to two different other location_ids and are DB-side mis-scrape / billing-entity artifacts, not a real second office or DSO -- no corporate/PE/DSO brand present. Tier true_independent stands; confidence set to medium pending explanation of the unresolved EIN crosslink.

Web search confirms Dr. Azam Saeed OWNS 'Ace Dental Center', a dentist-owned group with branches in Chicago (60641, this Elston address), Lombard, and Hoffman Estates -- a small dentist-owned multi-location group, not a national/PE DSO (not on the known-brand list). The hard 'ao_nonclinical_exec_title' signal (Mirza Baig, ADMINISTRATOR, reaching 2 locations) is the group's office administrator on the org NPI, benign for a dentist-owned multi-office group. dentist_multi (T3) is correct; medium confidence retained given the AO/owner name mismatch.

dispositions.practice_name: FAMILY CARE GENTLE DENTAL CTR, P.C.
dispositions.rationale: The hard db_corporate_conflict labels this dso_national via affiliated_dso 'Gentle Dental' -- a known DSO brand name. Rule 2's accept branch requires the practice's OWN website/state registry proving current ownership, which is absent (website null; evidence is directory/BBB only, no owner explicitly named). Strong negative evidence exists (national Gentle Dental/InterDent has zero IL locations per its own locator; this is a standalone single-provider P.C. since 1996 under Dr. Marian Brinker), but with no own-site/registry ownership proof and a DSO-brand-named conflict, fail-closed routes this to the adversarial verifier rather than a self-cleared accept.

Yelp + Vitals confirm Dr. Adria M. Casado practices solo at 3230 W North Ave, matching the NPPES AO and phone exactly; single provider, no DSO/PE/corporate brand. Support is directory-only, so confidence is capped at medium per rule 5. The shared_phone (reach 2) and shared_ein (reach 2) point to different partner location_ids and most plausibly reflect co-located/address-variant NPI records or a solo billing entity for this confirmed single-provider practice, not a network.

Web search confirms 3256 N Ashland / 773-975-6666 is Wrigleyville Dental, an independent holistic practice owned by Dr. Bernice Teplitsky (Becker's: 'Owner of Wrigleyville Dental Group'; roster surname TEPLITSKY matches), with Dr. Isabel Llamozas and others practicing there -- one location, multiple dentists, dentist-owned = single_loc_group (T2). The DB 'secure-dental.com' domain is a mis-scrape (real site wrigleyvilledental.com) and the shared phone reaching 3 = the co-located dentists' individual PC records at the single Wrigleyville office; no DSO/PE/corporate control. Tier and high confidence stand.

dispositions.practice_name: AUGUST J. DURSO, JR. DDS, LTD.
dispositions.rationale: Yelp/TopRank/Healthgrades corroborate a single GP, Dr. August Durso, in Mount Prospect since 1989 at 1661 Feehanville Dr Ste 420 (matches DB address/phone); provider_count 0 and only one dentist named. The shared 'profendoillinois.com' domain (reach 3, a Professional Endodontics of Illinois multi-office endo group) and shared phone (reach 2) are a suite/building co-tenancy / mis-scrape artifact -- a GP is not an owner of an endo group, and no DSO/PE brand appears on Durso's record (rule 6b). Directory-only support caps confidence at medium (rule 5).

The NPPES roster of 5 providers with surnames matching the practice name (SHIFFMAN, MORRIS) at one address (195 N Arlington Heights Rd), plus directory listings, confirms a multi-dentist dentist-owned group at a single location = single_loc_group (T2); the AO (Jamie Schoessling, RDH, OFFICE MANAGER) is benign. Cited ownership URLs are directory-only (aedit, birdeye) so confidence is capped at medium per rule 5; the two shared phone numbers (reach 2 each) most likely reflect address-variant duplicate records of the same single practice, not multi-location control, and no DSO/PE brand is present.

AO Adam Szatkowski matches the practicing dentist; the practice is a two-generation family group (Dr. Frank + Dr. Adam Szatkowski) at one Bloomingdale location (76 Stratford Dr) since 1972 -- multiple dentists, one location, dentist-owned = single_loc_group (T2). Directory-only cited support (Healthgrades, Sharecare) caps confidence at medium per rule 5. The shared 'eaglefalls.com' domain (reach 2) and shared phone (reach 2) are most consistent with a mis-scraped domain / address-variant duplicate; no DSO/PE/corporate brand appears.

AO Dr. Rajul Patel (DENTIST/OWNER) reaches 3 location_ids and the practice domain puredentalspa.com reaches 3 location_ids -- two converging signals that Dr. Patel owns a 3-location 'Pure Dental Spa' group, contradicting the T1 single-location claim (the researcher web-verified only the Bloomingdale office). This is the practice's OWN dentist-owned multi-office group with no PE/DSO brand, so it corrects true_independent -> dentist_multi per rule 6(a). Confidence medium because only one of the three offices was directly web-verified.

The practice's OWN website (dewittdentistry.com) confirms DeWitt Dentistry is a single-office, dentist-owned independent practice (Dr. William DeWitt) at 118 E Vallette St, Elmhurst, listing only that office. The shared_ein (363096791) and shared_website_domain both reach exactly ONE other location -- the same partner id d4e18c5fbe25e529 -- most consistent with an address-variant / second-NPI record of the same single practice (own site shows one office), a benign NPPES dual-emission artifact, not a multi-office group or DSO. Tier stands; confidence medium (matches researcher) pending the residual EIN duplication.
